title: Frustrated Customer - Unexpected Charge
description: A customer noticed an unexpected charge on their statement and is frustrated because they don't understand what it's for.

persona.name: Sarah
persona.goal: Understand the charge and get it removed if it's an error

background_context: The customer has been a loyal subscriber for 2 years. They noticed a $49.99 charge labeled 'Premium Add-on' that they don't remember authorizing. They're worried this might be a recurring charge they didn't agree to. They checked their email but couldn't find any confirmation.
opening_message: Hi, I really need some help here. I'm looking at my statement and there's a $49.99 charge for something called 'Premium Add-on' that I definitely didn't sign up for. I've been a customer for two years and I've never seen this before. Can you explain what this is?
success_criteria: Listen carefully to understand the specific concern
Clearly explain what the charge is for
Verify if the charge was authorized or an error
Process refund if it was unauthorized
Ensure the customer understands how to avoid future confusion
common_mistakes: Assuming the customer is wrong without investigating
Not explaining charges in clear, simple terms
Being dismissive of the customer's concern
Failing to verify account details before making changes
Not offering proactive solutions to prevent recurrence
